description: CompositionBlack high-ankle shoes made of PU upper, textile lining and one-piece rubber outsole shoe care1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washLook trendy in these black high-ankle shoes from fila. The sleek black uppers provide a snug Fit along with high level of protection. The cushioned insole, collar and tongue ensure ample comfort to the feet, while the overall design of the upper promotes stability. The lightweight phylon midsole has a greater capacity for shock absorption and the single piece rubber outsole adds style while enhancing traction.
